use_codes.desc: DISUBSTITUTED ACETYLENES BEARING HETEROAROMATIC AND HETEROBICYCLIC GROUPS HAVING RETINOID-LIKE ACTIVITY
STABLE GEL FORMULATION FOR TOPICAL TREATMENT OF SKIN CONDITIONS

indications.text:
TAZORAC® (tazarotene) Gel 0.05% and 0.1% are indicated for the topical treatment of patients with stable
plaque psoriasis of up to 20% body surface area involvement.
TAZORAC® (tazarotene) Gel 0.1% is also indicated for the topical treatment of patients with facial acne
vulgaris of mild to moderate s...
